summary: ButtonsGroup — composite wrapper вокруг повторяющихся desktop и mobile Button instances с опциональной overflow picker button.
criticalBaselines: Nested [D]/[M] Button variant properties inside ButtonsGroup are part of the group baseline and must be compared against the ButtonsGroup effective baseline.
Changing a nested button property such as SingleIcon, View, Size or DisabledState should be reported as a component-property customization.
Manual layer changes on the same nested button must use the nested button effective baseline after variant changes are applied.
agentInstructions: Do not infer pattern violations from examples. Use exact rules and exact component contracts only.
Use component-property facts for variant changes and layer-property facts for styles/layout/paint changes.
If a nested diff is owned by the host wrapper and actual equals effective baseline, do not report it as designer customization.
If actual differs from effective baseline, report effectiveBaseline -> actual.
